_comment: PB-018 T-004/T-005 — Power BI Push Dataset schema for the live tile.
_instructions: Authorization: Bearer <access_token>  (get token via OAuth client_credentials for the service principal)
The returned datasetId should be set as the Power BI output in the ASA job sa-pbi-live.
After creation, pin the table 'LiveEvents' to a dashboard tile with a 30-second refresh.
See PB-018 T-005 for the dashboard tile configuration (Tasneem).
name: ScholarPath – Live Events
